The pack-level production_ready claim is currently false/in_progress pending exactly one valid hardened review receipt plus the full validation suite; this receipt is the gating review.

Supported on inspection: (1) Implementation in packages/marketplace/src (registry.js, validators.js, model.js, states.js) is internally consistent — MARKETPLACE_CP854_PACK_BINDING matches the baseline (pack_id, risk C, 150 units, range, next CP00-855, upstream CP00-853); MARKETPLACE_CP854_REQUIREMENTS deliverable_counts and micro_title_row_counts match the prompt baseline distribution exactly (each totals 150); phase counts 34+116=150; case-set row math (WORKFLOW_ROWS=22, API_ROWS=22 with documented slices) sums to 150. (2) Tests (model.test.js) cover CP854 binding/coverage, runtime-closed descriptor, and contract projection, and assert all six implemented models. (3) On-disk contract matches the code projection: validation.valid=true, latest_pack_id/plan_pack_id=CP00-854, latest_projection descriptor=MarketplaceCp854CloseoutAppRegistryDescriptor, top-level mandatory_artifacts/required_capabilities/safety_gates/no_leak_guards present, full no_write_attestation (all flags false). (4) Plan has CP00-854 as the live current pack with full included_units; validation script enforces coverage, descriptor, contract, and the CP845->CP854 upstream chain.

Boundaries verified: no writeFile/append/network/child_process/process.env usage in src; the only 'runtime' references are descriptor boolean flags fixed to false, and validators reject any row with runtime/submission/install/permission-write/audit-write/product-state-write/real-data set true; descriptor spreads MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION. Authority boundary holds: Claude read_only=true and claude_is_final_approval=false throughout (descriptor, claude_packet, review-request, prompt); Hermes packet emits_runtime_receipt=false and is used only for deterministic review-packet/receipt handling (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false), not product runtime. Review-hardening (CP178+) is fail-closed: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON), tools=Read/Grep/Glob with forbidden_tools_present=false, prompt 2704<25600 bytes, summary-only correctly prohibited (Risk C + security/audit + review-evidence deliverables), and the current pending 0-byte stdout placeholder is NOT counted as a valid receipt (valid_review_receipts=[], invalid_review_attempts=[]).

Provenance: I executed no commands. The exit-0 results for npm run rp28:marketplace:validate and the marketplace model tests are reported evidence in command-evidence.json that I did not independently re-run; the full validation suite (npm test, npm run validate, closeout-pack(-plan):validate, weighted/fullplan/goal/rp00, git diff --check) is documented as pending post-review and must pass before production_ready flips. This PASS is contingent on that downstream suite passing and on this being the single valid pack-level review receipt.

Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS — no P0/P1; one non-blocking P3 scope-classification hygiene note. Does not block CP00-854 pack closeout or this-CP goal closeout. These classifications are mutually exclusive in intent: a file is either an active untracked implementation file of this pack or an unrelated preserved dirty file. The pack's own evidence directory (docs/closeout-packs/cp00-854/) is clearly pack-active, not unrelated; new-session-handoff.md is a generic cross-session handoff template whose embedded snapshot is stale (references CP00-082) and is not part of the RP28 marketplace deliverable set.
